title: llm_distill_entities_v1
description: Output schema for LLM entity-extraction. Pinned in repo so cache key changes when schema changes.

name.description: Canonical name as it appears in source (e.g., 'torch._dynamo.config.suppress_errors' for a config; a short symptom phrase for a symptom).

evidence.description: Verbatim quote from input text supporting this extraction. REQUIRED for audit. Must literally appear in the input.

detail.description: Optional one-sentence interpretation of the entity in context.

id_hint.description: Optional suggested entity id (snake_case). Auto-derived from name during promotion if missing.

relationship_to.description: Required for entity_type=relationship. The other entity's name.

confidence.description: LLM's self-reported confidence. Used to prioritize human review.
